text.title: Blameless Retro Template (Human Facilitation) Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals on the input to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml. Use when the right path is ambiguous.

decision-tree.root-question: Has the incident been declared AND resolved (or stable workaround exists)?

conclusion.verdict: Wait until stable. Mid-incident retros are noise.
Solo / pair: write a personal incident journal instead.
Run 4-block retro with non-skippable meta round.
Postpone 1-2 weeks until a non-responder facilitator is available.

text.example: resolved=true → team_size=3 → facilitator_available=true (jane.s, non-responder) → 4-block retro. References rule r4-meta-round-required.
